comment: Bend-local mirror of geologies_smoke.json. Same two scenarios (74 and 76) but pointed at the bend al_local_data path. Used by the local hybrid driver (run_al_local.py / run_baseline_global.py) when compute.local_geologies_config points here. Filenames must match geologies_smoke.json exactly so _build_geology_remappings can build the bend→Sherlock prefix swap.
